allow:
Bash(.env << 'EOF'
# Configuración básica
MINECRAFT_VERSION=1.21.1
MINECRAFT_TYPE=NEOFORGE
FORGE_VERSION=21.1.219

# Información del servidor
MINECRAFT_SERVER_NAME=Alpes Minecraft
MINECRAFT_MOTD=Alpes Minecraft

# Configuración de red
PORT=25585

# Configuración de jugadores
MINECRAFT_MAX_PLAYERS=10
MINECRAFT_VIEW_DISTANCE=10

# Configuración de juego
MINECRAFT_DIFFICULTY=normal
MINECRAFT_GAME_MODE=survival
MINECRAFT_FORCE_GAMEMODE=false
MINECRAFT_PVP=true
MINECRAFT_HARDCORE=false

# Configuración de mundo
MINECRAFT_ALLOW_NETHER=true
MINECRAFT_GENERATE_STRUCTURES=true
MINECRAFT_MAX_WORLD_SIZE=10000
MINECRAFT_MAX_BUILD_HEIGHT=256
MINECRAFT_MAX_TICK_TIME=60000

# Configuración de spawn
MINECRAFT_SPAWN_ANIMALS=true
MINECRAFT_SPAWN_MONSTERS=true
MINECRAFT_SPAWN_NPCS=true
MINECRAFT_ANNOUNCE_PLAYER_ACHIEVEMENTS=true

# Configuración técnica
MINECRAFT_ONLINE_MODE=true
MINECRAFT_PLAYER_IDLE_TIMEOUT=0
MINECRAFT_SNOOPER_ENABLED=false
MINECRAFT_ENABLE_COMMAND_BLOCK=false
MINECRAFT_GUI=false
MINECRAFT_ENABLE_AUTOPAUSE=false

# Configuración de memoria
MINECRAFT_INIT_MEMORY=1G
MINECRAFT_MAX_MEMORY=5G

# RCON
SERVICE_PASSWORD_RCON=wbvC4bCi3bYSzfks9yjOYScogAz4paZA

# CurseForge
CF_API_KEY=$2a$10$QHx6TLYkrh2vn6qwTz4spu.9DE1z.ZlY1kMuLpWhjzcMpC.w41WNW
EOF)
